name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no pressure at all. Dental visits aren't always easy to fit in, and we'd rather you come back when the timing feels right than feel rushed.

If and when you're ready, here's 20% off your next visit as a small thank-you for giving us a try:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and works on cleanings, consultations, or anything else on the books. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel a little less scary — painless cleanings, modern tech, zero sales pressure.

If something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely love to hear it — just hit reply. I read every message myself.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick note that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way. :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
